# System Overview Template

## Purpose

Use this template to provide a short orientation to a project, direction, or service.

## Template Body

```md
# System Overview

Status: Draft | Active | Archived

## Purpose

Describe why this system area exists.

## Main Users / Actors

- <Actor and relationship to the system>

## Main Capabilities

- <Capability>

## System Areas

- <Area and short responsibility>

## High-Level Boundaries

### In Scope

- <Responsibility>

### Out of Scope

- <Responsibility owned elsewhere>

## Related Directions / Services

- <Direction or service name and route>

## Reading Route

1. [<Next document>](<relative-link>)
2. [<Next document>](<relative-link>)

## Related Documents

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)
```
